description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging both foundational and advanced skills with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone. It is positioned as a moderate difficulty multiple‑choice test, suitable for self‑evaluation and resume building.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS selectors and specificity, Animations and transitions
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone preparing to showcase CSS expertise on a résumé
